privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.lead: How navel.pt processes personal data under the GDPR: controller, purposes, retention, rights and cookies.
privacy.introWhoText: José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda., with registered office at Rua Eng.º Abel Ferin Coutinho, Ponta Delgada, São Miguel — Azores, Portugal, tax ID 512012962, share capital EUR 700,000.00, supplies industrial machinery, tools, bearings, compressors and related technical services. This text explains how we process personal data on the website navel.pt.
privacy.whyPolicyText: Under Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), we explain the general rules applicable to personal data on this site: what data may be collected, why, how long it is kept, your rights and how to exercise them. We aim for lawful, fair and transparent processing.
privacy.scopeText: This policy applies to personal data processed by José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda. in connection with navel.pt (public pages, contact form, preferences on your device and the authenticated reserved area). The site may link to third-party websites (manufacturers, suppliers). Those sites have their own policies; we encourage you to read them. We are not responsible for processing carried out by third parties when you visit those destinations.
privacy.definitionsText: “Personal data” means information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person. “Processing” means any operation or set of operations on such data (e.g. collection, storage, consultation, erasure), with or without automated means.
privacy.controllerText: The controller of personal data collected through this site is José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda., with registered office at Rua Eng.º Abel Ferin Coutinho, Ponta Delgada, São Miguel — Azores, Portugal, tax ID 512012962.
privacy.dataProtectionContactText: For questions about this policy, our processing or exercising your GDPR rights, please use the contact details in the “Contact” section at the end of this page. Requests are handled by our organisation, without prejudice to your right to complain to the supervisory authority.
privacy.dataText: Depending on how you interact with us we mainly process: (i) contact details and message content when you use the contact form (name, email, subject, message); (ii) your email if you ask to join our mailing list via the footer newsletter flow — the request is sent with your email client rather than stored by the site in its own subscription database; (iii) data needed for the reserved area account and session (e.g. registration email, session identifiers managed by Supabase, metadata or files you upload, as configured for that service); (iv) language preference and cookie-banner acceptance stored locally (localStorage). This site does not use audience analytics or behavioural advertising tools (e.g. Google Analytics).
privacy.collection: When and how we collect data
privacy.collectionText: You provide data when you use the contact form; send a newsletter request email; register or sign in to the reserved area; and when your browser stores the keys listed in the table below. Submitting the form implies consent to processing for replying to your request and involves transmission to our server and email as described.
privacy.recipientsText: We do not sell your data. To run the site and reserved area we use providers that process data only as needed: Supabase Inc. (authentication and storage for the reserved area), Google LLC / Google services (font delivery — Google Fonts), and the hosting service where the site and contact PHP script run. They are bound by applicable law and contracts. We may also disclose data to authorities when required by law.
privacy.purposeText: We process data to: respond to your contact and information requests (pre-contractual measures or legitimate interest in replying, as applicable); manage the reserved-area account and files you store there (performance of a contract or related pre-contractual relationship); handle mailing-list requests by email where you have consented in that message; comply with legal obligations; store language preference and cookie consent where applicable (consent).
privacy.retentionText: We keep data only as long as needed: contact messages for the time needed to respond and for ordinary follow-up; reserved-area account data while the account exists or until you ask for erasure, subject to legal retention; local language and consent keys as stated in the table. After that, data is erased or anonymised where possible.
privacy.marketingText: We do not send generic promotional messages without an appropriate legal basis. If you asked to be on a mailing list by email, you may object or unsubscribe at any time using the contact details in the “Contact” section.
privacy.rightsText: Under the GDPR you may request access, rectification, erasure (“right to be forgotten”), restriction of processing, data portability where automated processing applies, object to processing in certain cases and withdraw consent where processing is based on it — without affecting lawfulness before withdrawal. You may lodge a complaint with the Portuguese Data Protection Authority (CNPD — www.cnpd.pt). We normally respond within 30 days unless complexity or repetitive requests apply under the law.
privacy.complaintsText: Without prejudice to contacting us first, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNPD, the Portuguese supervisory authority for data protection.
privacy.securityText: We apply appropriate technical and organisational measures, including HTTPS on the site, validation and rate limiting on the contact form, and providers that follow recognized security practices. We recommend an up-to-date browser and operating system and reviewing your device privacy settings.
privacy.transfersText: Some providers (e.g. Supabase or Google) may process data on infrastructure outside the European Economic Area. Where that happens we rely on GDPR safeguards such as standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission or other legal mechanisms, as described in those providers’ public documentation.
privacy.cookiesIntro: Cookies or similar technologies store information on your device. We mainly use localStorage for preferences (see table) and load fonts from Google servers, which may involve technical communication with Google. You can block or clear storage in your browser; some features may then not work correctly.
privacy.cookiesText: Relevant entries are listed below. Supabase authentication may set localStorage keys prefixed “sb-” to keep your session in the reserved area.
privacy.cookieRegisterLead: Identifiers and technologies used on this site.
privacy.changesText: José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda. may update this policy for legal or operational reasons. The current version is published on this page; please check back periodically.
privacy.contactText: To exercise your rights or ask questions: comercial@navel.pt or oficina@navel.pt; phone +351 296 630 120 / +351 296 205 290.
privacy.rgpdCrossLead: Dedicated GDPR page with data-subject rights and how to contact us to exercise them.

home.title: Naval repair, equipment and quality industrial accessories
home.lead: Sales, technical support and after-sales. Leading brands: Milwaukee Tools, Beta Tools, King Tony, Kranzle, Eurotrod and many more for industry and professionals.
home.value1Text: Naval repair activities and commercialisation of machines, tools and industrial accessories in the Azores.
home.value2Text: Shop and warehouse at Pico d'Água Park (Pico da Pedra) and shop and workshops in Ponta Delgada.
home.value3Text: All products sold by Navel benefit from training and after-sales technical support services.
home.socialProofStock: Over 45,000 references available in permanent stock
home.campaignsLead: Promotional brochures and offers from our brands.
home.milwaukeeSectionText: Professional Milwaukee Tools — M18, M12 and more. Contact us for catalogues and availability.

milwaukee.title: Milwaukee Tools
milwaukee.lead: Professional power tools and cordless solutions. Milwaukee is the leading brand in cordless solutions for demanding professionals.
milwaukee.whyText: Milwaukee Tools offers a complete range of professional tools: drills, impact drivers, saws, sanders, M18 and M12 systems, instrumentation and PPE. We represent the brand in the Azores with catalogues and technical support.
milwaukee.feature1: M18 and M12 cordless systems — maximum runtime and power
milwaukee.feature2: Professional power tools — drills, impact drivers, saws
milwaukee.feature3: Instrumentation and measurement — multimeters, thermal cameras
milwaukee.catalogText: Request Milwaukee catalogues in store or by email. Promotional campaigns available.
milwaukee.ctaText: Sales team at your disposal for information, quotes and availability.

about.title: About Navel
about.lead: José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda. — serving industry and professionals since 1982.
about.block1: José Gonçalves Cerqueira (NAVEL-AÇORES), Lda. was formally established in 1982. From the outset, the company has successfully developed its activity in Ponta Delgada in general mechanics and naval repair and maintenance, providing a range of specialised, high added-value services.
about.block2: As the business grew, the company built expertise in the sale of goods and equipment for industry across different technologies: generators, compressors and pumping units, high-pressure washers, hand and power tools, oil-based machinery and components — hydraulics, bearings and transmission products, mechanical seals, industrial parts and accessories, instrumentation and measurement equipment, and specialist maintenance products.
about.block3: With the opening of counters at the Pico d'Água Park warehouse and new display and customer service capabilities, the company developed its activity in the Automotive segment, complementing its range of professional machinery and tools and its range of fastening systems and welding solutions.
about.block4a: With a focus on improving service and exceeding customer and partner quality expectations, the company developed its purchasing and logistics processes and built capacity in technical support as part of its after-sales process.
about.block4b: NAVEL is committed to achieving quality objectives through a continuous improvement approach, with a focus on satisfying all its business partners.

services.lead: General mechanics, industrial equipment, naval repair, automotive and welding. Technical support and certified quality.

contact.lead: Shop, warehouses and workshops. We are at your disposal for information and quotes.
contact.location1: Shop and Warehouses — Pico d'Água Park
contact.address2: Rua Eng.º Abel Ferin Coutinho — Apartado 1481
contact.cta: For quote requests, product availability or technical support, contact us by phone or email.
contact.privacyNotice: Data you send us will be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
contact.quoteFormLead: Fill in the form and we will reply as soon as possible.
contact.quoteSuccess: Thank you! Your request has been sent. We will respond as soon as possible.
contact.quoteError: An error occurred while sending. Please contact us by phone or email.
contact.quoteErrorLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
contact.quoteErrorMissing: Please fill in all required fields.
contact.quoteErrorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.faq1Q: How can I request a quote?
contact.faq1A: Use the form above or contact us by phone (296 630 120 or 296 205 290) or email (comercial@navel.pt). We will reply as soon as possible.
contact.faq2A: Monday to Friday, 08:00–12:00 and 13:00–17:00, at both locations (Pico d'Água Park and Ponta Delgada).
contact.faq3Q: Can I request catalogues or brochures?
contact.faq3A: Yes. Ask in store, by email or through the form. We have Milwaukee, Beta, King Tony, Telwin and other brand catalogues.
contact.faq4Q: Do you ship to other islands?
contact.faq4A: Yes. Contact us for availability and shipping conditions across the Azores archipelago.
contact.faq5A: Yes. All products sold by Navel include training and after-sales technical support. Contact the workshop: oficina@navel.pt or 296 205 290.

rgpd.title: GDPR
rgpd.lead: Our commitment to the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and to data subjects’ rights regarding personal data.
rgpd.intro: Your personal data matters to us. We aim to process it lawfully, fairly and transparently in connection with the navel.pt website and your interactions with us.
rgpd.rightsTitle: Your rights as a data subject
rgpd.rightsIntro: As a data subject you may exercise the following rights under the GDPR, within applicable legal limits:
rgpd.rightErasure: Right to erasure (“right to be forgotten”)
rgpd.howText: To exercise any of these rights, contact us in writing (email given in the Privacy Policy or the contact form), stating your request clearly. To handle your request securely, we may ask you to confirm your identity. We respond without undue delay as required by law — typically within 30 days — unless prevented by law or where the request is unusually complex.
rgpd.privacyLinkText: The Privacy Policy explains in detail what we process, for what purposes, retention, processors, international transfers, cookies and how to reach us.
rgpd.ctaText: You may use the site contact form and state in the subject or message that the request concerns data protection (e.g. access, rectification or erasure). You can also write directly to the email addresses listed in the Privacy Policy.
